glosses.ja: 焼く; バーベキューをする

translations.en: We are grilling in the park.
translations.es: Estamos haciendo una barbacoa en el parque.
translations.fr: On fait un barbecue au parc.
translations.ru: Мы жарим на гриле в парке.
translations.pt: Estamos fazendo um churrasco no parque.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang nướng thịt trong công viên.
translations.nl: We zijn aan het barbecueën in het park.
translations.uk: Ми смажимо на грилі в парку.
translations.hi: हम पार्क में बारबेक्यू कर रहे हैं.
translations.ja: 公園でバーベキューをしています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; functions as the clause subject.
Main verb, finite present, 1st person plural; agrees with 'Wir' and denotes the action.
Preposition; contraction of 'in dem' (ADP + definite article, dative singular); introduces a locative prepositional phrase.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'in' in dative; specifies the location.

translations.es: Quiero hacer una barbacoa más tarde.
translations.fr: Je veux faire un barbecue plus tard.
translations.it: Voglio fare una grigliata più tardi.
translations.ru: Я хочу пожарить на гриле позже.
translations.pt: Quero fazer um churrasco mais tarde.
translations.he: אני רוצה לעשות על האש אחר כך.
translations.uk: Я хочу посмажити на грилі пізніше.
translations.hi: मैं बाद में बारबेक्यू करना चाहता हूँ.
translations.ro: Vreau să fac un grătar mai târziu.
translations.ja: あとでバーベキューをしたいです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; clause subject.
Modal auxiliary, finite present, 1st person singular; selects a bare infinitive and expresses volition.
Temporal adverb (comparative of 'spät'); modifies the time of the event.
Bare infinitive complement selected by the modal 'will'; lexical verb expressing the activity.

sentences.target: Am Wochenende grillen wir im Garten.

translations.de: Am Wochenende grillen wir im Garten.
translations.en: On the weekend, we grill in the garden.
translations.es: El fin de semana hacemos una barbacoa en el jardín.
translations.fr: Ce week-end, on fait un barbecue dans le jardin.
translations.it: Nel fine settimana facciamo una grigliata in giardino.
translations.zh-Hans: 周末我们在花园里烧烤。
translations.yue: 週末我哋喺花園燒嘢食。
translations.ru: В выходные мы жарим на гриле в саду.
translations.pt: No fim de semana fazemos um churrasco no jardim.
translations.he: בסוף השבוע אנחנו עושים על האש בגינה.
translations.vi: Cuối tuần chúng tôi nướng thịt trong vườn.
translations.ar: في عطلة نهاية الأسبوع نحن نشوي في الحديقة.
translations.nl: In het weekend barbecueën we in de tuin.
translations.uk: На вихідних ми смажимо на грилі в саду.
translations.hi: सप्ताहांत में हम बगीचे में बारबेक्यू करते हैं.
translations.el: Το σαββατοκύριακο κάνουμε μπάρμπεκιου στον κήπο.
translations.nb: I helgen griller vi i hagen.
translations.id: Akhir pekan kami memanggang di halaman.
translations.sv: I helgen grillar vi i trädgården.
translations.ro: În weekend facem un grătar în grădină.
translations.da: I weekenden griller vi i haven.
translations.ja: 週末は庭でバーベキューをします。

tokens.explanation: Preposition; contraction of 'an dem' (ADP + definite article, dative singular); introduces a temporal PP ('on the weekend').
Common noun, neuter; object of 'an' in dative; sets the temporal frame.
Main verb, finite present, 1st person plural; verb-first due to fronted PP ('Am Wochenende') in a V2 clause.
Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; clause subject appearing postverbally because of fronting.
Preposition; contraction of 'in dem' (ADP + definite article, dative singular); introduces a locative PP.
Common noun, masculine; object of 'in' in dative; specifies the location.

sentences.target: Morgen gehen wir am See grillen.

translations.de: Morgen gehen wir am See grillen.
translations.en: Tomorrow we are going to grill at the lake.
translations.es: Mañana vamos a hacer una barbacoa junto al lago.
translations.fr: Demain, on va faire un barbecue au bord du lac.
translations.it: Domani facciamo una grigliata al lago.
translations.ko: 내일 우리는 호숫가에서 바비큐를 할 거예요.
translations.yue: 聽日我哋去湖邊燒嘢食。
translations.ru: Завтра мы будем жарить на гриле у озера.
translations.pt: Amanhã vamos fazer um churrasco à beira do lago.
translations.he: מחר אנחנו עושים על האש ליד האגם.
translations.vi: Ngày mai chúng tôi sẽ nướng thịt bên hồ.
translations.nl: Morgen gaan we barbecueën bij het meer.
translations.uk: Завтра ми будемо смажити на грилі біля озера.
translations.hi: कल हम झील के किनारे बारबेक्यू करेंगे.
translations.el: Αύριο θα κάνουμε μπάρμπεκιου δίπλα στη λίμνη.
translations.nb: I morgen skal vi grille ved innsjøen.
translations.id: Besok kami akan memanggang di tepi danau.
translations.sv: I morgon ska vi grilla vid sjön.
translations.ro: Mâine facem un grătar lângă lac.
translations.da: I morgen skal vi grille ved søen.
translations.ja: 明日私たちは湖のほとりでバーベキューをします。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb; clause-initial element modifying the time of the event.
Main verb, finite present, 1st person plural; motion verb that takes an infinitival complement ('grillen') in a light-verb construction.
Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; clause subject.
Preposition; contraction of 'an dem' (ADP + definite article, dative singular); introduces a locative PP.
Common noun, masculine; object of 'an' in dative; location ('at the lake').
Bare infinitive complement to 'gehen'; denotes the activity; non-finite form.
